scripts.dev:tunnel: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f ../../.env ] && . ../../.env; [ -f ../../.env.local ] && . ../../.env.local; set +a; if [ -z "$CLOUDFLARED_TUNNEL_TOKEN_API" ]; then echo "Missing CLOUDFLARED_TUNNEL_TOKEN_API"; exit 1; fi; cloudflared tunnel run --token "$CLOUDFLARED_TUNNEL_TOKEN_API"'
scripts.build: cd ../.. && pnpm --filter @chris-test/fcp build && pnpm --filter @chris-test/db build && pnpm --filter @chris-test/graph build && pnpm --filter @chris-test/graph-ingest build && pnpm --filter api run build:local
scripts.deploy:cf: sh -c 'pnpm exec wrangler deploy --var COMMIT_SHA:$(git rev-parse HEAD)'
scripts.deploy:cf:dry-run: sh -c 'pnpm exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --var COMMIT_SHA:$(git rev-parse HEAD)'
